string-array.name: recent_card_headline_empty
string-array.item: Start with\nyour very first photo
This is where\nyour story begins
Today,\nlet\'s take your first step
Fill this empty space\nwith your first photo
Starting is half the battle\none photo is all it takes
Capture\nyour very first moment
Your first check-in\nis easier than you think
Capture who you are today\nand keep it
This moment\nbecomes your first page

string-array.name: recent_card_headline_today
string-array.item: One step today,\nlet\'s keep filling it in
Today\'s photo is in\nnicely done
The photo you took today\nwill stay with you
Today, captured,\nbecomes tomorrow\'s strength
One photo at a time,\npainting your memories
Checked in again today\nkeep this rhythm going

string-array.name: recent_card_headline_recent
string-array.item: Leave a photo\nwherever you go
Just like yesterday,\nlet\'s capture today too
No pressure,\njust add one more
You\'re on a roll,\nlet\'s keep it going today
A little gap,\none photo fills it right in
Keep it going\nwith today\'s photo
Perfect timing right now,\nleave a photo
At your own pace,\ntake it slow
Today\'s too good to miss,\ncapture a photo

string-array.name: recent_card_headline_paused
string-array.item: It\'s been a few days,\nshall we start again today?
A little break is okay,\nlet\'s pick it back up
It\'s been a while,\nhow about a photo today?
Even if the streak breaks,\nyou can always start again
Your journal is waiting,\nshall we fill it today?
A few days\' gap,\none photo fills it in
Time to pick up\nthe camera again
After the pause,\nlet\'s carry on
It\'s been about a week,\none more photo today
Take your time coming back,\nnow\'s just right

string-array.name: recent_card_headline_dormant
string-array.item: Your last photo\nis waiting for you
Your records don\'t disappear,\npick up anytime
Today, once more,\na photo like day one
From where you paused,\nshall we start walking again?
Welcome back,\none photo is all it takes
Your past records\nare glad to see you
A fresh start today,\nlet\'s capture it again
